---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or workflow improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What workflow are you trying to do?

Describe the scenario in your own words. What are you working on
when you wish MacroFlow did this?

## Proposed solution

The behavior you'd like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Anything you've tried as a workaround, or related ways to solve this.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, references to similar features in other tools.
